===================
=== bd1979-1980 Bits.txt
===================
===================
===================
Dylan
1979-1980 Bits n' pieces - beyond tours

1. Trouble In Mind, take 7 [5:01]
2. Trouble In Mind [4:20]
3. Slow Train [4:15]
4. Gotta Serve Somebody [4:00]
5. Tell Me The Truth One Time [1:45]
6. Wandering Kind [3:16]
7. Responsibility [2:35]

8. Yonder Comes Sin [4:15]
9. Radio spot: Blowin' In The Wind / Gotta Serve Somebody / Mr Tambourine
Man / Slow Train / Blowin' In The Wind [1:10]

#1: 30.4.79 Muscle Shoals Sound Studio, Sheffield, Alabama; Slow Train Coming outtake, unedited version.
#2: 30.4.79 Muscle Shoals Sound Studio, Sheffield, Alabama; Slow Train Coming outtake, last verse cut out - single edit.
#3: 3.5.79 Muscle Shoals Sound Studio, Sheffield, Alabama; single edit.
#4: 4.5.79 Muscle Shoals Sound Studio, Sheffield, Alabama; single edit.
#5-7: probably September 1979 Helena Springs Demos - Dylan may or may not play the piano. All three compositions written by Bob Dylan & Helena Springs.

#8-9: September to November 1980, Rundown Studios, Santa Monica, California; tour rehearsals. #8 issued as Special Rider demo. #9 used to promote the San Diego (26.11.80) show on the radio.
===================
